question: What are the id and name of the song sung by the most participants?
sql: SELECT songs.id, songs.name FROM songs JOIN performance_score ON songs.id = performance_score.songs_id GROUP BY songs.id, songs.name ORDER BY COUNT(participant_id) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找参与人数最多的歌曲

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题意图，即查找参与人数最多的歌曲，并通过正确的聚合、分组和排序方式实现。
